function.message: I can’t fully complete this inbox request as written because one of the five specified source files does not exist: `50_finance/purchases/_2025_12_26__eur_000066__bill__hearthline_epaper_panel.md` (leading underscore). I verified the folder contains only `50_finance/purchases/2025_12_26__eur_000066__bill__hearthline_epaper_panel.md`. Please confirm whether the underscored entry was a typo or provide the missing file.
function.rulebook_notes: Per inbox workflow, if request is missing canonical support, stop without mutating workspace. Also, incomplete partial processing is disallowed; clarification is required.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox task explicitly listed five files to OCR. One listed path could not be read (file not found), and verification search in `50_finance/purchases` found only the non-underscored variant. Completing only four of five would be a partial result requiring guessing.
